_fixture_notes: Tests the `duplicate_ingredient_name` 23505 error path in `src/lib/import/commit.ts`. The single ingredient is deliberately a name that won't seed-match, forcing the matching panel to show a `none` row with a Create New form. To trigger the 23505: when Create New opens, type a `canonical_name` that already exists in the master (e.g. `olive oil` or any other seeded ingredient name) and submit. The commit_import RPC will attempt the INSERT, Postgres will return 23505 on `ingredient_canonical_name_key`, and commit.ts's error-details parsing path runs against a real error payload. The commit transaction rolls back — no meal, ingredient, or import_log row is created. Re-run the fixture by reloading the import page; no DB cleanup needed.
name: Dupe-Name Trip Recipe
